featured_projects.title: Kalchar
featured_projects.description: Production folk-art portfolio and commission site for a traditional artist - Madhubani, Pichwai, Lippan, and Gond artwork gallery with a buy filter, events, workshops, custom orders, and a server-rendered admin panel. Public pages are static, catalog lives in Neon Postgres behind a single data seam, and artwork images are served from Cloudflare R2.
features: Artwork gallery with buy filter, events, workshops, and custom-order flows
Admin panel (artworks, events, profile, maintainers) behind Auth.js + Google with a DB allowlist
Neon Postgres catalog via Drizzle, R2 image variants pipeline, WhatsApp order handoff
Static/SSG public pages + server-rendered admin on Vercel, Motion + Lenis animations

featured_projects.title: GitScope
featured_projects.description: A Chrome extension plus web dashboard that adds deep GitHub profile insights - 9-stat grid, coding personality badges, language breakdown, activity heatmap, contribution donut, repo growth timeline, profile comparison, and a leaderboard across everyone you follow. Published on the Chrome Web Store with GitHub OAuth for traffic analytics.
features: 9-stat grid, coding personality, quick insights, and velocity trend
Language breakdown, activity heatmap, contribution donut, repo growth timeline
Profile comparison with 17 head-to-head stats, leaderboard across who you follow
Personal dashboard with traffic data (views, clones, referrers) via GitHub OAuth

featured_projects.title: Ledger Sync
featured_projects.description: A self-hosted personal finance dashboard (v2.19.0) with an AI chatbot that uses 15 read-only tool calls to answer questions about your spending, trends, tax, and goals. Upload Excel/CSV bank statements, get SHA-256 deduplication, 50/30/20 budgeting, bill calendar, GST analysis, subscription tracking, year-in-review, FIRE planning (Lean/Barista/Standard/Fat), India FY tax estimation, Sankey cash flow, and a Financial Health Score across 8 metrics.
features: AI finance chatbot with 15 tool calls (App mode or BYOK), multi-provider LLM support
50/30/20 Budget Rule page, bill calendar, GST analysis, subscription tracker, year-in-review
FIRE calculator (Lean/Barista/Standard/Fat), Coast FIRE, retirement corpus, India FY tax estimator
Financial Health Score, Sankey cash flow, anomaly detection, recurring transaction detection

featured_projects.title: LeetCode Rating Predictor
featured_projects.description: Full-stack LeetCode contest rating predictor using a Dense neural network trained on 244K+ contest records, featuring a FastAPI backend with LeetCode GraphQL integration and a React glassmorphism frontend.
features: Dense neural network trained on 244K+ contest records
Automated data pipeline via LeetCode GraphQL API
Glassmorphism React frontend with live contest selection
34 backend tests + 11 frontend tests, Docker + Render deploy

featured_projects.title: Blue Green AWS Terraform
featured_projects.description: A comprehensive Infrastructure as Code solution for implementing Blue-Green deployment on AWS using Terraform, providing a complete CI/CD pipeline with zero-downtime deployments across ECS Fargate, ALB, CodePipeline, and KMS-encrypted artifacts.
features: Zero-downtime Blue-Green deployments orchestrated by CodeDeploy
Automated CI/CD with CodePipeline + CodeBuild + ECR
Containerized apps on ECS Fargate with ALB health checks
KMS encryption, IAM least-privilege, multi-environment (dev/staging/prod)

featured_projects.title: Instagram Likes Leaderboard
featured_projects.description: A browser-based tool with three modes - Likes Leaderboard, Stats Dashboard, and Follower Analysis - that scans your Instagram posts and surfaces your biggest fans, ghost followers, non-mutuals, and engagement metrics. No downloads or sign-ups required.
features: Three analysis modes: Likes Leaderboard, Stats Dashboard, Follower Analysis
Ghost follower / non-mutual / mutual detection, top fans, most-liked post
Multi-step scan with pause/resume and progress bars
Desktop console + Android Eruda browser support, no sign-up needed

featured_projects.title: Personal Portfolio
featured_projects.description: This site - a minimal dark developer portfolio with an ambient aurora background, project cards with live screenshots and animated SVG covers, and a fully data-driven JSON architecture. Built with React 19, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS v4, Motion, and Lenis smooth scroll.
features: Minimal dark design with ambient aurora + beam background
Project cards with live site screenshots and animated SVG covers
Data-driven content via JSON files
GitHub activity calendar integration

featured_projects.title: SelfHub
featured_projects.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that acts as your personal digital memory hub - store notes, preferences, code snippets, tasks, and any info from any MCP-enabled AI assistant (Claude Desktop, VS Code Copilot). Your personal knowledge base travels with you across AI conversations.
features: MCP-compliant server with stdio transport for Claude Desktop + VS Code
store_memory, list_memories, search_memories, and more tools
Cross-AI memory persistence - access from any MCP client
Simple setup via config file path

collaborative_projects.title: Code Arena
collaborative_projects.description: A real-time competitive coding platform where 2-5 friends race to solve LeetCode problems with built-in C++ and Python execution via sandboxed Piston containers. Features Blind Race and Live Status Board modes with a server-authoritative WebSocket timer and LeetCode-style Monaco editor. Live demo is UI-only (backend offline).
features: Real-time multiplayer coding races with 2-5 players, private 6-char room codes
Built-in C++ and Python execution in sandboxed Piston containers
Blind Race mode (no peeking) and Live Status Board mode
Server-authoritative WebSocket timer, Monaco editor with language toggle and test cases

collaborative_projects.title: Placemento
collaborative_projects.description: A comprehensive web-based placement management system for MCA students at NIT Warangal, with student dashboards, company profiles, placement analytics, JWT + email OTP auth, interview experience sharing, and role-based access control. Built as a monorepo serving the entire batch.
features: JWT auth with email OTP verification, role-based access (admin/student)
AG Grid-powered student/company data tables with advanced filtering
Placement analytics, trend visualization, interview experience sharing
Automated email notifications for placement activities

collaborative_projects.title: Lingua Connect
collaborative_projects.description: An interactive online platform built on the MERN stack, connecting language learners with personalized tutors for tailored online lessons.
features: Language tutor matching
One-to-one video calls
Flashcard storage
Subscription-based payments
User registration and search

collaborative_projects.title: LeetCode Among Us
collaborative_projects.description: A competitive LeetCode tracking platform for MCA NITW students with personal dashboards, real-time leaderboards, contest performance tracking, and badge collections. Features multiple view modes (Overview, Problem Stats, Contest Stats, Performance) and batch-wise comparisons.
features: Personal LeetCode dashboard with profile analytics and activity calendar
Real-time leaderboards with dynamic filtering and batch comparisons
Contest performance tracking with ratings and rankings
Medal badges for top 3 performers, dark mode support

collaborative_projects.title: MCA NITW Website
collaborative_projects.description: The official web portal for the MCA department at NIT Warangal - alumni networking, student directory, study materials, placement cell coordination, and CR cell panel. Full-stack MERN application serving current students, faculty, and alumni.
features: Alumni network with individual profile detail pages
Student directory, study materials, faculty contacts
Placement cell coordination and CR cell panel
Light/dark mode, responsive design, bcrypt auth

collaborative_projects.title: Noobathon
collaborative_projects.description: A team hackathon project built during MCA 1st year at the CSEA Noobathon event, featuring a responsive web page created collaboratively in a team of 3.
features: Built in a team of 3
CSEA Noobathon hackathon entry
Responsive web design
First collaborative project

other_projects.title: Sagas
other_projects.description: A living library of unfinished books - original fantasy, fan fiction, and essays written in the open, one chapter at a time. Astro static site with content collections and zero client JS; every book is a folder of Markdown, drafts are public, and git history is the writing log.
features: Three shelves: original fantasy, fan fiction, and essays
One folder per book: book.md plus a Markdown file per chapter
Chapter status tracking (draft / revising / final) with RSS feed on publish
Zero client-side JavaScript, deploys to GitHub Pages on every push

other_projects.title: Instagram Autopilot
other_projects.description: Fully automated Instagram content creation and posting powered by AWS Bedrock AI and Composio v3, publishing live daily. Cron generates topics, captions, and premium AI image carousels via Stability Image Ultra, with dedup history, content-filter resilience (skips filtered slides, publishes if 2+ remain), and Instagram location tags via Meta Places - all through GitHub Actions.
features: Daily cron publishes live - topic + caption + image prompts via Bedrock Claude
Premium AI image carousels via Stability Image Ultra with negative prompts
Content-filter resilience: skips filtered slides, publishes when 2+ survive
Dedup history committed back to repo, wide-niche content pillars via config.json

other_projects.title: Financial Dashboard
other_projects.description: The original Excel-upload financial dashboard that evolved into Ledger Sync. Built with React + TypeScript, featuring Chart.js visualizations, 50/30/20 budgeting, tax planning, and lifestyle analytics. Now superseded - see Ledger Sync for the production-ready successor.
features: Drag-and-drop Excel upload (Money Manager backup format)
Investment Performance Tracker (P&L, brokerage, returns)
Tax Planning (80C, HRA, slab breakdown), Family & Housing Manager
Lifestyle Optimizer - credit card analytics, cashback, commute cost

other_projects.title: AWS DevOps Infrastructure
other_projects.description: A full-stack FARM (FastAPI, React, MongoDB) application containerized with Docker and deployed on AWS ECS, with a comprehensive CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, Terraform, and Amazon ECR.
features: Dockerized FARM stack with user management and blog system
Automated CI/CD: GitHub Actions -> ECR -> ECS
AWS infrastructure as code with Terraform
Test coverage reporting with Pytest, linting via Pylint + Flake8 + Prettier

other_projects.title: AI Code Translator
other_projects.description: An AI-powered code translation tool that converts code between 50+ programming languages using OpenAI's API. Features CodeMirror syntax highlighting and real-time streaming translation. Originally forked from mckaywrigley/ai-code-translator.
features: Translate between 50+ programming languages
Syntax highlighting with CodeMirror
Real-time streaming translation
Clean responsive UI with Tailwind CSS

other_projects.title: Stock Market Prediction
other_projects.description: An LSTM neural network that predicts stock prices for major tech companies (AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, TSLA) using historical market data from Yahoo Finance with moving averages and technical analysis visualizations.
features: Multi-stock prediction (AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, TSLA)
LSTM neural network for time series forecasting
Moving averages and technical analysis
Actual vs predicted price comparisons

other_projects.title: Brainstorm Verse
other_projects.description: A modern idea-sharing platform built with Next.js 14 App Router where creativity meets collaboration. Threaded comments, personalized user profiles, secure Clerk authentication, and file uploads via UploadThing.
features: Next.js 14 App Router with TypeScript + shadcn/ui components
Secure authentication with Clerk, personalized onboarding
Threaded comments, real-time updates, image/file uploads
React Hook Form + Zod validation

other_projects.title: Authentication System
other_projects.description: A production-ready MERN authentication module with JWT tokens (7-day expiry), bcrypt password hashing, Joi password-complexity validation, and CORS-enabled protected routes. Reusable auth scaffold for MERN stack applications.
features: JWT-based auth with 7-day expiry and protected routes
Password complexity enforced via joi-password-complexity (upper/lower/digit/symbol)
Bcrypt password hashing with salt rounds
CORS-enabled, server-side Joi schema validation, React Router frontend

other_projects.title: Contact Manager
other_projects.description: A full-stack MERN contact management app with MongoDB persistence, full CRUD, search/filter, dark/light mode with localStorage, and zero-refresh SPA navigation via React Router. Frontend on GitHub Pages, backend on Render.
features: Full CRUD with MongoDB persistence via Mongoose
Search and filter contacts by name or email
Dark/light mode persisted in localStorage
Zero-refresh SPA navigation with React Router 7

other_projects.title: Tour Vibes
other_projects.description: A full-stack MERN travel journal with JWT auth, image uploads via Multer, community and personal feeds with pagination, likes/comments, full-text search across titles/content/tags, and Framer Motion animations. Built with Vite 7 + React 19 + shadcn/ui.
features: JWT auth with 1-hour expiry, auto-logout, rate limiting on auth endpoints
Travel posts with image uploads (Multer 5MB limit), tags, location, travel date
Community feed (paginated, sortable), likes/comments, full-text search
Dark/light mode, Framer Motion transitions, skeleton loading, Sonner toasts

other_projects.title: PacMan Game Unity
other_projects.description: A classic Pac-Man game recreated using Unity Engine with C# scripting for an authentic gaming experience.
features: Classic Pac-Man gameplay
Unity2D graphics
Interactive controls
Game physics

other_projects.title: Minesweeper Game Unity
other_projects.description: A classic Minesweeper game recreated using Unity Engine with C# scripting, featuring grid-based gameplay and mine detection mechanics.
features: Classic Minesweeper gameplay
Grid-based mine detection
Interactive controls
Unity2D graphics

other_projects.title: Snake Game Unity
other_projects.description: A classic Snake game built using Unity Engine with C# scripting, featuring smooth movement mechanics and score tracking.
features: Classic Snake gameplay
Smooth movement mechanics
Score tracking
Unity2D graphics

other_projects.title: Flappy Bird Game Unity
other_projects.description: A Flappy Bird clone built using Unity Engine with C# scripting, featuring physics-based gameplay and obstacle generation.
features: Flappy Bird gameplay
Physics-based mechanics
Procedural obstacles
Unity2D graphics

other_projects.title: Music Web Player
other_projects.description: A modern music player with glassmorphism UI, built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features shuffle/repeat modes, rotating album art, and a seekable progress bar.
features: Glassmorphism UI design
Shuffle and repeat playback modes
Rotating album art animation
Interactive seekable progress bar

community_projects.title: skillcheck
community_projects.description: Conformance suite for Agent Skills (SKILL.md), published on npm. Linters check syntax; skillcheck checks reality: 36 rules with exact skills-ref parity, client-extension awareness across 6 runtimes (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Cursor, OpenCode), structure and reference validation, SARIF output, and a drop-in GitHub Action.
features: 36 lint rules with message-for-message parity against the reference validator
Client-extension awareness: knows which frontmatter fields each of 6 runtimes accepts
Structure + relative-reference validation, trigger-test scaffolding
SARIF output for code scanning and a drop-in GitHub Action

community_projects.title: ITR MCP
community_projects.description: Local-first MCP server for Indian income tax, published on npm. Deterministic tax computation, old-vs-new regime comparison, advance tax planning, and document parsing - all on your machine. The LLM never does arithmetic; every number comes from a versioned, auditable rule pack. Works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and any MCP client.
features: compute_tax and compare_regimes with slab, cess, and surcharge handling
Advance tax planning and LTCG/STCG capital gains computation
Local document parsing - no accounts, no uploads, no cloud
Versioned rule packs so every figure is auditable

community_projects.title: Claude Skills
community_projects.description: Custom Claude Code plugin marketplace (v5.1.0) with 16 curated plugins covering dev workflow, testing, CI/CD, Docker, refactoring, git workflows, open source contributions, Python clean code, animation, and more. Installable via /plugin marketplace.
features: 16 curated plugins spanning agents, hooks, skills, and slash commands
Stack-specific plugins (farm-stack, ci-cd, docker-deploy, deps-audit, repo-polish)
clean-code (Python Clean Code catalog) and motion (animation audit/add/fix) plugins
CI validation pipeline and tiered installation guide

community_projects.title: Claude Cost Optimizer
community_projects.description: Installable Claude Code plugin with cost-mode skill that saves 30-60% on costs through concise responses, model routing, budget hooks, and efficient workflow patterns. Includes web-based Repo Analyzer, Cost Calculator, and Badge Checker tools.
features: cost-mode skill with 3 intensity levels (lite / standard / strict)
Web-based Repo Analyzer with cost grade (A+ to F) and recommendations
Cost Calculator and shields.io badge checker
11 deep-dive guides, stack-specific CLAUDE.md templates, 40+ agent support via skills.sh

community_projects.title: Bedrock Multi-Model MCP
community_projects.description: MCP server for AWS Bedrock - text, image, video generation, and embeddings across Llama 4, Mistral, Nova, Cohere, DeepSeek, Qwen, GPT-OSS, Stable Diffusion 3.5, and Claude. Use any Bedrock model from Claude Code or any MCP client. Supports bearer token auth and side-by-side model comparison.
features: bedrock_ask and bedrock_compare - send prompts to one model or 2-5 side-by-side
Text models: Llama 4 Maverick/Scout, Mistral Large, Nova Pro/Lite, Claude, Cohere, DeepSeek R1
Image models: Nova Canvas (2048x2048), Titan Image v2, SD 3.5 Large, SDXL
Video generation via Nova Reel (async S3 output), bearer token auth fallback

community_projects.title: MCP Toolkit
community_projects.description: Reusable utilities and middleware for building production-ready MCP servers. Drop-in packages for the TypeScript SDK covering auth, caching, rate limiting, logging, and CORS - so you stop reimplementing the same plumbing for every MCP server.
features: @mcp-toolkit/auth - API key and JWT authentication
@mcp-toolkit/cache - response caching with TTL and LRU
@mcp-toolkit/rate-limit - token bucket strategy
@mcp-toolkit/logger (structured JSON) and @mcp-toolkit/cors (origin validation)

community_projects.title: Claude Code Recipes
community_projects.description: 47 copy-paste recipes for Claude Code covering 12 commands, 9 subagents, 5 hooks, and MCP configs. Every recipe works out of the box - just drop into your .claude/ folder and use immediately.
features: 12 command recipes (/code-review, /pr-description, /refactor, /debug, /migrate)
9 subagent recipes (researcher, test-runner, code-reviewer, security-analyst)
5 hook recipes + MCP server configurations
Model-tier annotations (haiku/sonnet/opus) for cost-aware adoption

community_projects.title: Awesome MCP Servers
community_projects.description: A curated [awesome] list of Model Context Protocol servers, frameworks, clients, tutorials, and community resources - covering data, developer tools, cloud, productivity, search, AI/ML, finance, and observability.
features: Categorized MCP server directory (Data, Dev Tools, Cloud, AI/ML, Finance)
Frameworks and clients listings with official SDKs and Inspector
Tutorials, articles, videos, and community links
Community-maintained with open contribution PRs

community_projects.title: Deploy Guide
community_projects.description: Step-by-step deployment guides for every platform - 25+ guides, 10 platforms, 8 frameworks, 5 databases. Covers GitHub Pages, Vercel, Render, Railway, Fly.io, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, AWS ECS, DigitalOcean, and more.
features: 10 platform guides (GitHub Pages, Vercel, Render, Railway, Fly.io, Netlify, Cloudflare, AWS ECS, DigitalOcean)
8 framework guides (React, Next.js, Express, FastAPI, Flask, Django, MERN, FARM)
5 database guides with free-tier notes
Copy-paste configurations, CI/CD templates, custom domain walkthroughs

community_projects.title: Agent Recipes
community_projects.description: Copy-paste AI agent workflows for real-world developer tasks - code review, testing, migrations, documentation, security scanning, and deployment automation. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, or any AI coding assistant.
features: Code review: PR review, architecture review, dependency audit, performance review
Testing: unit test generation, E2E writer, coverage gap finder
Migrations: JS->TS, React class->hooks, CJS->ESM
Documentation: README generator, API docs, changelog writer

community_projects.title: AI Git Hooks
community_projects.description: AI-powered git hooks that review code, generate commit messages, catch bugs, and scan for security issues before you push. Drop-in hooks using Claude, OpenAI, or local Ollama for every stage of your git workflow.
features: pre-commit: AI code review for bugs, style, anti-patterns
prepare-commit-msg: auto-generated conventional commit messages from diff
commit-msg: validation against conventional commit spec
pre-push: security scan for secrets, vulnerabilities, and large files

community_projects.title: Credly Badge README Action
community_projects.description: A GitHub Action that auto-syncs your Credly certifications and badges to your GitHub profile README - no more manual updates when you earn a new cert. Categorizes badges into Industry Certifications, Professional/Partner, and Knowledge/Learning with non-destructive HTML-marker updates.
features: Auto-fetch Credly badges via public API and sync weekly
Categorized sections: Industry Certifications, Professional/Partner, Knowledge/Learning
Non-destructive updates using <!-- CREDLY-BADGES:START/END --> markers
Dark/light theme support via Credly CDN, configurable retry and categorization
